title: diffuse-cpp: High-Performance CPU Inference Engine for Diffusion Language Models
description: First C++ inference engine for diffusion language models, built on GGML. Achieves 11-22 tok/s on real prompts with Q4_K_M quantization and entropy-based adaptive scheduling on a 12-core CPU — up to 2.6x faster than llama.cpp on equivalent hardware. Supports 256-token generation with 20% better cost per token vs short sequences.
notes: Companion software for the paper 'Diffusion Language Models are Faster than Autoregressive on CPU' (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19119814)
